'''Cryalira''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Tarasin]] who served as the [[Irstat-Kes]] of the [[Hiironi irstat]], the largest [[Tarasin]] [[irstat]] on [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]].

==Biography==
Cryalira spent most of her life as a hunter. She was surprised when the previous Irstat-Kes, [[Meirana]], died shortly after the previous Mother did, making her Irstat-Kes instead of [[Dariana]]. She would have preferred roaming the jungle to her duties leading the irstat.<ref name="cg" />

She had difficulty making decisions for the tribe, believing that she had not been trained nor had talent for the role; but she was still growing into her position, and many believe she would made an excellent Irstat-Kes with time. Certain discontent elements of the irstat were conspiring against her in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].<ref name="cg" />

Cryalira had the tendency to raise her crest when presiding, leading many to believe she was always angry.<ref name="cg" />

Her known relatives included her grandson, [[Fisonna]].<ref name="cg" />
